# Release title

Patch: Fix npm provenance repository URL

---

## Changelog

## [1.0.3] - 2026-05-07

### Fixed

- Added `repository` field to `package.json` required by npm provenance verification
- Corrected `repository.url` format to `git+https://github.com/TenGosc007/t3core.git` to pass sigstore provenance bundle validation
